title: Shiguang Dailiren III

synonyms: 时光代理人 第三季 Part One

synopsis:
After the Li Tianchen incident came to a close, Time Photo Studio returned to a superficial peace. However, the news of Xia Fei's disappearance once again drew everyone into a crossroads of fate. With Vein's return and Qiao Ling's awakening of her superpowers, Cheng Xiaoshi and Lu Guang gradually uncover the secrets of the Bahati fire case, and Cheng Xiaoshi's father, Cheng Weimin, and mother, Shao Yuanyuan, also seem to have intricate connections to it. As the investigation deepens, Liu Xiao from a mysterious organization begins his operation, and the intervention of Yingdu police officer Jae further complicates this pursuit of the truth...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
